home.title: Find positions
home.comingSoon: Coming soon. Please check back later.

listing.externalNote: Applications and full details are handled on the institution's official page. This site does not collect applicant information.

links.title: Researcher Job Site Directory
links.intro: Major sites for finding postdoc and faculty positions worldwide. Check each site for listing details.
links.disclaimer: This page is a directory of external links. We do not reproduce or republish listings from these sites.

post.title: Post a job
post.intro: Posting is free. A confirmation email will be sent to the address you enter; follow the link inside to review and publish your listing. This site does not handle applicant information.
post.titlePlaceholder: e.g., Assistant Professor opening, XX Lab, XX University
post.summaryPlaceholder: Outline of the position, qualifications, conditions (max 4000 characters)
post.emailNote: Used only to send the confirmation and edit links. Never shown on the site.
post.successBody: We sent a confirmation email to {email}. Open the link inside to review and publish your listing.

errors.titleTooLong: Title must be 200 characters or less.
errors.summaryTooLong: Summary must be 4000 characters or less.
errors.invalidUrl: Enter a valid URL starting with http(s)://.
errors.invalidDeadline: Deadline must be today or later (within 2 years).
errors.rateLimited: Too many submissions from this email address. Please try again tomorrow.
errors.sendFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

email.confirmSubject: [Academia Note Jobs] Confirm your job listing
email.confirmBody:
We received your job listing.

Open the link below to review it and press the publish button to make it public.
Keep this link safe — it is also used to edit or delete the listing later.

{url}

If you did not request this, please ignore this email.
email.linkFlaggedSubject: [Academia Note Jobs] We could not reach your listing's link
